<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="c5rwGA848c8AFA0nAKeS"> <mxGraphModel dx="1895" dy="1375" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="k3s Cluster" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=20;shadow=0;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="190" width="1210" height="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="Helm release: grafana" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;verticalAlign=top;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="680" y="240" width="545" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Helm release: promtail" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;verticalAlign=top;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="240" width="548" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="Helm release: loki" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;verticalAlign=top;shadow=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="405" y="425" width="520" height="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="StatefulSet loki-0" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="425" y="465" width="199" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="Service loki
ClusterIP :3100" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="695" y="462" width="208" height="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="DaemonSet promtail" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="125" y="280" width="206" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="Service promtail :3101" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="381" y="280" width="222" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="Deployment grafana" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="710" y="280" width="201" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="Service grafana
NodePort 80:32000" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="960" y="280" width="241" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1.01;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;strokeWidth=2;startSize=10;endSize=10;startFill=1;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;" edge="1" source="8" target="7" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="228" y="400" /> <mxPoint x="799" y="400" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1.01;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;strokeWidth=2;startSize=10;endSize=10;startFill=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;" edge="1" source="10" target="7" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="810" y="400" /> <mxPoint x="851" y="400" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
